name: Cohen & Co Inc.
summary: Cohen & Co Inc. (COHN) is a financial services firm involved in asset management and capital markets activities. The company manages investment funds, including SPAC Series Funds, and acts as an asset manager and sponsor in SPAC (Special Purpose Acquisition Company) activities. It also engages in investments in SPAC entities and SPAC sponsor entities.
